onlyOnDesktop.rationale: Desktop in-app changelog route surfaces the repo changelog; the web docs portal uses a separate engineering navigation IA.
Product docs page under desktop CMO IA; not duplicated as a portal entry (web portal focuses on engineering specs and runbooks).
Desktop reference doc for in-app readers; web exposes `docs/frontend-api-reference.md` instead for the same product surface.
Desktop-packaged CLI reference; engineering deep-dives live under `docs/` in the portal, not this bundled copy.
Desktop concepts hub; portal indexes different concept/spec documents under superpowers.
Desktop security chapter; portal does not yet mirror this page as a standalone markdown entry.
Desktop guides landing; portal lists guides across `docs/` paths with different titles and IA.
Desktop docs home shell; portal uses `docs/README.md` as the primary markdown index instead.
Desktop install guide bundled for the app; portal covers release flow via `docs/macos-desktop-release.md`.
Desktop reference landing; portal splits reference material across multiple `docs/` entries.
Desktop upgrades page; portal documents releases in `docs/macos-desktop-release.md` and related ops docs.
Desktop security hub; portal does not expose an equivalent single markdown route in `DOCS_PORTAL_SECTIONS`.
Desktop “start with Pharos” product doc; portal starts from `docs/README.md` and engineering onboarding docs.
Desktop trust chapter; portal has no matching path entry today.
Desktop product explainer; high-level positioning in portal is split across README and superpowers specs.
Shared repo doc linked from desktop concepts; portal lists related but non-identical architecture specs instead.

onlyOnWeb.rationale: Contributor conventions for humans/IDE; not bundled into the desktop in-app docs router.
Architecture cheat sheet for agent tooling; desktop IA targets end users, not this file.
Repository overview linked from portal; desktop routes use `apps/desktop/.../home.md` for the in-app home.
Portal index markdown; desktop uses `apps/desktop/src/docs/content/home.md` as the packaged home page.
Engineering UX contract for the web client; not part of the desktop product docs outline.
HTTP/WebSocket contracts for Solid; desktop references use `api-contracts.md` under packaged content.
Release runbook for operators; desktop shows user-facing install/upgrade pages instead.
Team workflow doc for development; excluded from the desktop end-user documentation set.
Internal planning artifact surfaced in the portal; not shipped inside the desktop reader.
Implementation plan for observation work; portal-only per engineering IA.
Planning doc for Gemini tailing; not included in desktop `DOC_ROUTES`.
Design spec for Claude visibility; web portal navigation only.
Core observation design spec; not mirrored as a desktop-packaged page.
Roadmap spec for stakeholders; desktop IA does not embed this markdown path.
Solid UI contract for the web app; desktop docs omit this engineering-heavy document.
